== Notes for [[Item:Q100506|Q100506]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/67/Benvenisti-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree - HaLevi, Benvenisti''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8ED8041EFBBFA9822EF79916CCF49
geni:6000000010279672880

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
